name: linkding
description: Skills for operating a Linkding bookmark manager.

linkding_url.title: Linkding URL
linkding_url.description: Base URL of the Linkding instance, including scheme. Do not include a trailing slash.

linkding_api_key.title: API Key
linkding_api_key.description: Linkding API token used in the Authorization: Token header.

interface.longDescription: Linkding provides bookmark search, creation, update, tagging, and cleanup workflows for the self-hosted bookmark manager.
defaultPrompt: Use Linkding to find bookmarks about Rust MCP.
Save this URL to Linkding with tags.
